flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pearl River Community College rose 50% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.5k → $9.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pearl River Community College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pearl River Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pearl River Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2k → 4.9k).
